name: Cloud Cost Anomaly & Cryptojacking Response
description: Detects abnormal cloud cost spikes that may indicate cryptojacking or unauthorized resource provisioning. Riggs AI analyzes the cost anomaly to identify the responsible resource and determine if it represents malicious activity. Confirmed cryptojacking triggers resource identification, termination of unauthorized instances, forensic investigation of the provisioning actor, incident ticket creation, and team notification. Legitimate cost spikes receive documentation and budget alert.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: AWS Security Hub
required_integrations.reason: Source of cost anomaly and resource abuse findings, API for resource termination

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for confirmed cryptojacking or unauthorized resource usage

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the security and FinOps teams of cost anomalies and response actions

config.description: Triggers when an abnormal cost spike is detected by AWS Cost Anomaly Detection, GCP billing alerts, or Azure Cost Management

config.additional_instructions: Analyze cost anomaly for cryptojacking indicators: large GPU/compute instances, unusual regions, high CPU utilization patterns, unknown AMIs or container images
config.description: AI-powered analysis of the cost anomaly to determine whether it indicates cryptojacking, unauthorized resource provisioning, or legitimate usage growth
Routes based on whether the AI assessment identified the cost spike as malicious activity

config.query: List all resources created in the last 72h in region={{trigger_1.alert.region}} with high cost attribution: instance types, launch times, creators (CloudTrail), associated IAM roles, CPU utilization
config.description: Query cloud APIs to identify the specific resources responsible for the cost spike and their provisioning details

parameters.reason: Cryptojacking / unauthorized resource abuse — terminating to stop cost bleed

config.description: Terminate all identified unauthorized or cryptojacking resources to immediately stop the cost bleed

config.query: CloudTrail events for resource creation by actor={{code_1.offending_resources.creator}}: all API calls in last 7 days, source IPs, other resources created, IAM policy changes
config.description: Investigate the actor who provisioned the unauthorized resources to determine if credentials were compromised
Create an incident ticket documenting the cost anomaly, terminated resources, and actor investigation
Notify security and FinOps teams of the cost anomaly resolution

parameters.note: Reviewed by Riggs AI (cloud_security template). Cost spike determined to be legitimate usage growth, not cryptojacking. Assessment: {{analyze_1.summary}}

config.description: Document that the cost anomaly was determined to be legitimate
Cloud cost anomaly detection and response complete
